content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "熱天聊天",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "今天天氣好熱，你有沒有覺得？",
          "pinyin": "Jīntiān tiānqì hǎo rè, nǐ yǒu méiyǒu juéde?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jin1tian1 tian1qi4 hao3 re4, ni3 you3 mei2you3 jue2de?",
          "translation_en": "The weather is so hot today, don't you think?",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 날씨가 정말 덥죠, 그렇지 않나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對啊，今天三十度，真的很熱。",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, jīntiān sānshí dù, zhēn de hěn rè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a, jin1tian1 san1shi2 du4, zhen1 de hen3 re4.",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, it's 30 degrees today, really hot.",
          "translation_ko": "맞아요, 오늘 30도라서 정말 덥네요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我想喝一杯冰咖啡，你要不要也喝？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng hē yī bēi bīng kāfēi, nǐ yào bù yào yě hē?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 he1 yi1 bei1 bing1 ka1fei1, ni3 yao4 bu4 yao4 ye3 he1?",
          "translation_en": "I want to drink an iced coffee, do you want one too?",
          "translation_ko": "아이스 커피 한 잔 마시고 싶은데, 당신도 마실래요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，我也很渴。我們去咖啡店吧。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, wǒ yě hěn kě. Wǒmen qù kāfēi diàn ba.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a, wo3 ye3 hen3 ke3. Wo3men qu4 ka1fei1 dian4 ba.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, I'm also very thirsty. Let's go to the coffee shop.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 저도 목이 많이 마르네요. 커피숍에 가요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "今天太陽很大，我們要小心路滑。",
          "pinyin": "Jīntiān tàiyáng hěn dà, wǒmen yào xiǎoxīn lù huá.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jin1tian1 tai4yang2 hen3 da4, wo3men yao4 xiao3xin1 lu4 hua2.",
          "translation_en": "The sun is very strong today, we need to be careful of slippery roads.",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 태양이 강해서 길이 미끄러우니 조심해야 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題，我們慢慢走。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, wǒmen màn man zǒu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3men man4 man zou3.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, we'll walk slowly.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 천천히 걸어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does A want to drink?",
          "question_ko": "A는 무엇을 마시고 싶어합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Hot coffee", "Iced coffee", "Tea"],
          "options_ko": ["뜨거운 커피", "아이스 커피", "차"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe today's weather and what you want to drink."
    },
    {
      "title": "下雨天的心情",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "今天下雨了，你有帶傘嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Jīntiān xià yǔ le, nǐ yǒu dài sǎn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jin1tian1 xia4 yu3 le, ni3 you3 dai4 san3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "It's raining today, did you bring an umbrella?",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 비가 오는데, 우산 가져왔어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有，我帶了。可是我的心情不太好。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, wǒ dài le. Kěshì wǒ de xīnqíng bù tài hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, wo3 dai4 le. Ke3shi4 wo3 de xin1qing2 bu4 tai4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I brought it. But I'm not in a very good mood.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 가져왔어요. 그런데 기분이 별로 좋지 않아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "為什麼？下雨天讓你心情不好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wèishénme? Xià yǔ tiān ràng nǐ xīnqíng bù hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wei4shen2me? Xia4 yu3 tian1 rang4 ni3 xin1qing2 bu4 hao3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Why? Does rainy weather make you feel bad?",
          "translation_ko": "왜요? 비 오는 날이 기분을 안 좋게 하나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，我比較喜歡晴天。有太陽的時候，心情比較好。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān qíngtiān. Yǒu tàiyáng de shíhou, xīnqíng bǐjiào hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, wo3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 qing2tian1. You3 tai4yang2 de shi2hou, xin1qing2 bi3jiao4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I prefer sunny days. When there's sun, my mood is better.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 저는 맑은 날을 더 좋아해요. 해가 있을 때 기분이 더 좋아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我懂。不過下雨天可以放鬆，在家看書也不錯。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ dǒng. Bùguò xià yǔ tiān kěyǐ fàngsōng, zài jiā kàn shū yě bùcuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 dong3. Bu4guo4 xia4 yu3 tian1 ke3yi3 fang4song1, zai4 jia1 kan4 shu1 ye3 bu2cuo4.",
          "translation_en": "I understand. But rainy days can be relaxing, reading at home is also nice.",
          "translation_ko": "이해해요. 하지만 비 오는 날은 긴장을 풀 수 있고, 집에서 책 읽는 것도 괜찮아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你說得對。那我今天回家看書好了。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ shuō de duì. Nà wǒ jīntiān huí jiā kàn shū hǎo le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 shuo1 de dui4. Na4 wo3 jin1tian1 hui2 jia1 kan4 shu1 hao3 le.",
          "translation_en": "You're right. Then I'll go home and read a book today.",
          "translation_ko": "맞는 말이에요. 그럼 오늘 집에 가서 책을 읽을게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What weather does B prefer?",
          "question_ko": "B는 어떤 날씨를 더 좋아합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Rainy days", "Sunny days", "Cloudy days"],
          "options_ko": ["비 오는 날", "맑은 날", "흐린 날"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Talk about your mood on rainy days."
    },
    {
      "title": "今天好累",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你今天看起來很累，怎麼了？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ jīntiān kàn qǐlái hěn lèi, zěnme le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 jin1tian1 kan4 qi3lai2 hen3 lei4, zen3me le?",
          "translation_en": "You look very tired today, what's wrong?",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 피곤해 보이는데, 왜 그래요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我昨天很晚睡覺，今天早上六點就起床了。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān hěn wǎn shuìjiào, jīntiān zǎoshang liù diǎn jiù qǐchuáng le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zuo2tian1 hen3 wan3 shui4jiao4, jin1tian1 zao3shang4 liu4 dian3 jiu4 qi3chuang2 le.",
          "translation_en": "I went to bed very late yesterday, and got up at six this morning.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 아주 늦게 잤는데, 오늘 아침 6시에 일어났어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "難怪你沒精神。你應該多休息。",
          "pinyin": "Nánguài nǐ méi jīngshén. Nǐ yīnggāi duō xiūxi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Nan2guai4 ni3 mei2 jing1shen2. Ni3 ying1gai1 duo1 xiu1xi5.",
          "translation_en": "No wonder you have no energy. You should rest more.",
          "translation_ko": "그러니까 기운이 없군요. 좀 더 쉬어야 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對啊，我今天壓力很大，工作太多了。",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, wǒ jīntiān yālì hěn dà, gōngzuò tài duō le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a, wo3 jin1tian1 ya1li4 hen3 da4, gong1zuo4 tai4 duo1 le.",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, I'm under a lot of pressure today, too much work.",
          "translation_ko": "맞아요, 오늘 스트레스가 많아요, 일이 너무 많아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "辛苦了。下班以後，我們一起去散步，放鬆一下。",
          "pinyin": "Xīnkǔ le. Xiàbān yǐhòu, wǒmen yīqǐ qù sànbù, fàngsōng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xin1ku3 le. Xia4ban1 yi3hou4, wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 san4bu4, fang4song1 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "That's tough. After work, let's go for a walk together and relax a bit.",
          "translation_ko": "수고했어요. 퇴근 후에 같이 산책 가서 좀 긴장을 풀어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，謝謝你。散步以後，心情應該會比較好。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, xièxie nǐ. Sànbù yǐhòu, xīnqíng yīnggāi huì bǐjiào hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a, xie4xie5 ni3. San4bu4 yi3hou4, xin1qing2 ying1gai1 hui4 bi3jiao4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, thank you. After the walk, my mood should be better.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 고마워요. 산책 후에는 기분이 좀 나아질 거예요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why is B tired today?",
          "question_ko": "B가 오늘 피곤한 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["He went to bed late", "He woke up late", "He didn't eat breakfast"],
          "options_ko": ["늦게 잤다", "늦게 일어났다", "아침을 먹지 않았다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Explain why you are tired today and what you plan to do."
    }
  ]
}
